text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Argh! What an unexpected twist of fate...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it wasn't your fault, Trainer! Don't worry
about it!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: But still, how could this have happened?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I must seek the truth from Shiraoki! Woiya, haiya!
